title: Physical Therapy * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Physical Therapy * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a call-in center for family members of children and youth with special needs and chronic health conditions (developmental and emotional disabilities, behavioral problems, and chronic physical illnesses) and professionals who serve them. The center specializes in providing information and resources related to health information, health care access, and special needs systems and supports. All calls are confidential. Families may also request to be placed on an email list to receive monthly correspondence about issues of importance to children and youth with special needs in Oregon. 707 SW Gaines Street Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Family members of individuals age 26 and younger with special physical, emotional, behavioral, or mental health needs, including those who are at risk or suspected of having a special need. The child/youth does not have to have a diagnosed condition. Does not require documentation to prove citizenship to receive services. Hours: Message line available 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (833) 990-9930 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PROVIDENCE HEALTH AND SERVICES OREGON AND SOUTHWEST WASHINGTON PROVIDENCE CHILD CENTER PROVIDENCE CHILDREN'S DEVELOPMENT INSTITUTE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides physical, occupational, and speech therapies, autism therapy, feeding and nutrition services, audiology, and neurodevelopmental assessments. 830 NE 47th Avenue Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-5:30pm (503) 215-2240 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER PROVIDENCE HEALTH AND SERVICES OREGON AND SOUTHWEST WASHINGTON PROVIDENCE CHILDREN'S DEVELOPMENT INSTITUTE
